project_info.archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted for Tactical Precision
project_info.vibe: Cinematic, moody, expensive, objective, highly technical, reliable.

design_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix tactical UI (aviation/dashboard) with premium high-end e-commerce layout.
Emotion First: The dark mode conveys night-driving focus and high-tech safety.
Contrast over Color: Color is purely functional. 95% of UI is deep monochrome, color is used for active states, warnings, and trust badges.
Zoom In: Use large, bold typography and massive product crops for high impact.
Safety & Trust: Clean, unambiguous forms, prominent security locks, and clear Brazilian payment options.

rules: No Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans.
Never center paragraphs. Left-align for technical precision.
Use small_caps for overlines and data labels (e.g., 'ESPECIFICAÇÕES TÉCNICAS').
Ensure minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio for all text.

spacing_and_layout.generous_spacing: Use p-8, p-12, p-16 for structural sections. Containers with borders need at least p-6.
spacing_and_layout.hero_grid: MODE A: Tetris Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8. Hero image spans col-span-8, text/CTA col-span-4.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_bento: MODE B: Control Room Grid. For technical specs and feature comparisons. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4. Every pixel utilized.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Mobile-first, start with grid-cols-1. Optical alignment for icons inside buttons.

surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glass: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10. Must be sticky (z-50).
surface_strategies.cards_and_bento: Grid Borders: border-collapse style layout, sharp edges (rounded-none or max rounded-md), flat background (bg-surface_elevated), subtle 1px border (border-white/10). No soft shadows.
surface_strategies.ctas: Solid, high-contrast. bg-primary text-inverse font-bold. Hover: bg-primary_hover scale-[1.02] transition-transform.
surface_strategies.forms: Technical, secure look. bg-transparent border-b-2 border-white/10 rounded-none focus:border-primary focus:ring-0. Labels must be small_caps.

libraries: shadcn/ui (highly customized for forms, select, dialogs)
components_and_interactions.buttons: Sharp corners (rounded-sm). Use lucide icons. Add data-testid to all buttons.
components_and_interactions.inputs: Use Shadcn customized. Dark background, clear white text, primary focus color. Provide input masking logic for CPF (000.000.000-00), CEP (00000-000), Phone ((00) 00000-0000).
components_and_interactions.hover_states: ALWAYS explicitly set text color on hover. Example: hover:bg-white hover:text-black.
components_and_interactions.animations: Subtle, deliberate. Use framer-motion for page transitions and staggering bento grids. No bouncy or playful animations.

rules: Hero Image Overlay: Max bg-black/50, or use gradient overlay.
No placeholders. Use only the URLs provided below.

hero_and_backgrounds.description: Main Hero Background: Cinematic night driving

hero_and_backgrounds.placement: About or Lifestyle section to build trust and vibe
Background for specs or feature comparison table
Background for the Multi-Alarms feature highlight

brazilian_ecommerce.language: All copy MUST be in Portuguese (pt-BR).
brazilian_ecommerce.pricing: Base price: R$ 297,00. Display clearly: 'R$ 282,15 com 5% de desconto no PIX'.
auth_and_checkout_fields: CEP (Integração com ViaCEP para auto-completar endereço)
Endereço Completo (Rua, Número, Complemento, Bairro, Cidade, Estado)
brazilian_ecommerce.payment_methods: Highlight PIX as the primary/preferred option with the 5% discount (use color #32BCAD for PIX). Secondary: Cartão de Crédito.

trust_signals.visuals: Use Lucide icons for Security (ShieldCheck, Lock).
trust_signals.copy: Use phrases like 'Compra 100% Segura', 'Dados Criptografados', 'Garantia de Qualidade'.

testing_and_accessibility.data_testid: ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, cart triggers, checkout steps) MUST have a kebab-case data-testid attribute.
testing_and_accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over images uses text-shadow or dark overlays. Follow APCA contrast guidelines.
